content.en:
After all these immeasurable ruin monsters died, it also meant that Ye Tian had broken through the first layer of the Huanyu Tower.

At this moment, a golden substance merged into Ye Tian's body.

The next moment, Ye Tian's body was quickly tempered by this substance.

"Is it ......?"

Ye Tian accelerated the refining of these substances, and quickly refined his body with immeasurable blood.

I don't know how long it has been, but he has finally refined these substances thoroughly.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's body completed the tenth full-body refinement, and he also advanced some distance.

"What kind of resource is this, it can actually allow me, who has only only undergone the ninth full-body tempering, to complete the tenth full-body tempering in a short period of time!"

He was extremely surprised, such an opportunity is too precious!

And this is just the benefit of breaking through the first layer of the Cosmos Tower, no wonder everyone wants to obtain the Cosmos Order.

"Intruder, have you entered the second floor of the Cosmos Tower?"

The voice of the Cosmos Tower Spirit came.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian replied.

Airplanes!

He was teleported again, this time on a special plane.

Here, he saw a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

By copying the talent, he spied on the other party's talent.

"Talented, this is not a condensed Great Ancestor, could it be a real Great Ancestor?"

Ye Tian wondered.

At this time, the request of the second layer appeared, allowing him to kill the Great Ancestor in front of him.

And at this moment, the Great Ancestor looked at Ye Tian with a solemn expression.

"What is this place?"

The Great Ancestor asked.

"Universal Tower!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"It's actually the Cosmos Tower!" the Great Ancestor's face changed, but he quickly sneered: "If I were facing a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, I might be worried, but you are only a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, so I guess you have just broken into the Cosmos Tower! You must not be my opponent, as long as you take the initiative to admit defeat, you can leave!"

"Let's fight!"

Ye Tiandao.

The rewards on the first floor of the Universal Tower are very precious, and if you break through the second floor of the Universal Tower, you will have a greater chance.

Therefore, he could not just give up!

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian fought with this Great Ancestor in an instant.

In just one fight, he confirmed the strength of the opponent.

"Top Fifth Stage Combat Power!"

This level is about the same as his strength, and he is not very sure whether he can kill the other party.

However, he wanted to give it a try!

Instantly, he began to burn his own immeasurable blood.

After the immeasurable blood of superior quality was burned, his strength increased again.

Not only that, but he also activated the Infinite Feather Armor Mark, increasing his own defense, so as to resist the opponent's attacks.

"How is it possible, you are only a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

The Great Ancestor was dumbfounded.

But Ye Tian's strength had surpassed many of the top fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they were all approaching the peak fifth-stage combat power.

Soon, he fell into disadvantage.

I thought that he was also a very powerful existence among the top fifth-stage great ancestors, but I didn't expect that today he couldn't even defeat a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

Of course, he also saw that Ye Tian's bottom was fine.

The immeasurable bones and immeasurable blood have all reached the super-quality, and they also have the imprint of the top immeasurable supernatural powers, this kind of background is definitely not an ordinary Great Ancestor, and may even be the heir of the Heavenly Ancestor!

"Damn, the Universal Alliance is just a platform formed by a group of Great Ancestors who have no hope of becoming Heavenly Ancestors and have no background, how can there be such a demonic Great Ancestor, and let me run into it!"

This Great Ancestor was a little panicked at the moment, but this area was shrouded by the Cosmos Tower, and he couldn't escape.

Unless Ye Tian gave up, he would have no way to leave.

Time passed slowly, and the Great Ancestor gradually became injured.

"You can't go crazy, if you burn immeasurable blood like this, it will hurt your foundation, and if you use the immeasurable magic imprint, it will also have an impact on the fifth stage of impact!" the Great Ancestor persuaded.

However, Ye Tian ignored the other party's words and continued to attack.

After another period of time, Ye Tian didn't have anything to do, and that Great Ancestor was already on the verge of death.

At this point, he finally began to beg for mercy.

"Please, don't kill me. I can give you all the treasures of my body, so that I can make up for your losses, so you can let me go!" the Great Ancestor pleaded bitterly.

"The Cosmos Tower asked me to kill you, this is the second layer of the Cosmos Tower, I don't think you can come up with a reward comparable to the second layer of the Cosmos Tower!" Ye Tian said.

"What, the second floor of the Cosmos Tower!"

This Great Ancestor's face changed.

It was impossible for anyone to give up the reward of the second layer of the Cosmos Tower, and it was impossible for him to be in Ye Tian's position.

"Your Excellency, I am a member of the Xuanming Pavilion, the Xuanming Pavilion has two Heavenly Ancestors, if you kill me, the Xuanming Pavilion will not let you go!"

The other party began to threaten.

However, Ye Tian naturally didn't believe the other party's nonsense.

With the mystery of the Huanyu Tower, even the Heavenly Ancestor may not be able to find out.

What's more, it was just a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and the Heavenly Ancestor might not have to go all out to investigate.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian condensed the last sword, and the power of the immeasurable supernatural power technique was condensed into one point, which was penetrated by Ye Tian's first sword.

Tear and pull!

Time and space were penetrated in an instant, and it directly penetrated the last defense of that Great Ancestor, directly penetrating it.

The terrifying force annihilated its flesh and blood little by little, and finally turned it into ashes.

At this point, this fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform has completely fallen.

"If I hadn't completed ten full-body tempering, it would have been really difficult for me to kill him, but now at some cost, I can kill such a Great Ancestor!" Ye Tian sighed.

After killing this Great Ancestor, Ye Tian also obtained the opportunity of the second layer of the Huanyu Tower.

"It's this treasure!"

Ye Tian looked at the purple flower that appeared in front of him and immediately recognized it.

Purple Golden Flower!

This is an incomparably precious treasure with many functions, and it is also one of the ten materials required for the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body.

He didn't deliberately look for the Xuanzi Golden Flower, but he also knew that this kind of treasure was difficult for him to find, and its value might be much more valuable than Tongtian True Gold.

I didn't expect to get such a Xuanzi Golden Flower in the Huanyu Tower this time.

"Xuanzi Golden Flower, plus Tongtian True Gold, I have gathered two of the ten materials, which is not bad, once I have gathered the ten materials, I can start cultivating the ten-armed golden body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he put it away and headed to the third floor of the Universal Tower.

He figured that he would not be able to get past the third floor, but he also wanted to go in and have a look.
